calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff CACH, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant HARUN CETIN.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of Tom Vigil pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Principal $12,274.12
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees waived.
Costs $430.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $12,704.12
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Assigned To Trial Court
